paper_goal: Workshop paper draft on retrieval-grounded support for literature review writing

sections.name: Introduction
sections.goal: Establish the writing-grounding problem and motivate the study.
claims: Academic literature review writing depends on faithful evidence synthesis.
Current generative systems often produce unsupported or weakly grounded review text.
evidence: Recent work on grounded scientific writing systems
Studies on citation faithfulness in LLM writing

sections.name: Related Work
sections.goal: Position the paper against existing scientific writing and review-synthesis systems.
claims: Prior work covers retrieval, summarization, and writing support, but often separately.
Few systems integrate end-to-end evidence tracing for review drafting.
